metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Javi Pazos — advisory board, terraform upgrade, and more

plugins.name: advisory-board
plugins.description: An advisory board of five thinkers — Sinek, Sutherland, Pink, Kahneman, and Stoic philosophy — for reflection, decision-making, and persuasion

plugins.name: negotiate
plugins.description: Evidence-based negotiation assistant for written negotiations — salary, contracts, vendor terms, stakeholder influence

plugins.name: voice-profile
plugins.description: Javi's voice profile — calibrates Claude's responses, drafts, and tone to match how Javi actually communicates across contexts
